channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Blue Jays' Max Scherzer felt 'imminent danger' after latest injury cuts season debut short
item.description: Max Scherzer seemed to have an issue with his thumb, which prompted Blue Jays manager John Schneider to pull the three-time Cy Young Award winner from a game in the third inning.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Shohei Ohtani ramps up throwing program, but Roberts says MVP isn't close to mound debut for Dodgers
item.description: Shohei Ohtani has thrown his first bullpen session since late February, but the reigning NL MVP still has plenty of work to do before he takes the mound for the Los Angeles Dodgers.
item.dc:creator: Greg Beacham, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Bueckers has career-high 40 to lead one-woman March Madness rout for UConn, 82-59 over Oklahoma
item.description: SPOKANE, Wash. (AP) — Paige Bueckers scored a career-high 40 points, rescuing UConn from its first-half doldrums and single-handedly turning a tight game against Oklahoma into an 82-59 rout on Saturday that sent the Huskies to the Elite Eight of the women's NCAA Tournament.
item.dc:creator: ANNE M. PETERSON, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Walter Clayton Jr. rallies Florida into Final Four with 84-79 March Madness win over Texas Tech
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Walter Clayton Jr. rescued top-seeded Florida with two late 3-pointers, and the Gators rallied from nine points down late to reach the Final Four with an 84-79 victory over Texas Tech in the NCAA Tournament's West Region final on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Madison Booker and top-seeded Texas outlast SEC rival Tennessee 67-59 to reach Elite Eight
item.description: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. (AP) — Texas coach Vic Schaefer got the tense battle he expected between his defensive-minded Longhorns and the highest-scoring team in the country in Tennessee.
item.dc:creator: ALANIS THAMES, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Scherzer allows 2 HRs, leaves Blue Jays debut after 3 innings because of right lat soreness
item.description: TORONTO (AP) — Three-time Cy Young Award winner Max Scherzer left his debut start with the Blue Jays on Saturday because of soreness in his right lat muscle. “I just didn’t feel like I could really let the ball go,” Scherzer said, adding that he felt the soreness during his pregame warmup.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chance McMillian available for Texas Tech in Elite 8 against Florida
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (AP) — Texas Tech star outside shooter Chance McMillian returned for the Red Raiders' Elite Eight game against Florida after missing the previous four games with an oblique injury.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Auburn's Pettiford, Michigan State's Richardson renew AAU rivalry in Elite Eight of March Madness
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — Auburn's Tahaad Pettiford and Michigan State's Jase Richardson are high-scoring, left-handed freshman guards who have more in common than big games that helped to propel their teams to the NCAA Tournament's Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Transgender athletes open up about suing Trump administration over bans from girls sports
item.description: Two New Hampshire transgender athletes opened up about their lawsuit against President Donald Trump's administration over recent trans athlete bans in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Ice dancers Madison Chock and Evan Bates win a 3rd straight world title as US medal haul continues
item.description: Madison Chock and Evan Bates became the first ice dancers to win three consecutive world championships in nearly three decades.
item.dc:creator: Dave Skretta, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: NCAA committee won't grant wavier for Colorado-Syracuse spring football game despite push from Deion Sanders
item.description: More than 47,000 fans attended Colorado's 2023 spring game, despite snowy conditions at Folsom Field. But spring games across the U.S. have started to dwindle.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luge officials predict 2026 Olympic sliding races will be in Italy, a good sign for Milan-Cortina
item.description: Next year's Olympic sliding races will be in Italy after all, international luge officials predicted Saturday in another ringing endorsement of the newly rebuilt track in Cortina d'Ampezzo.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Breanna Stewart re-signs with the New York Liberty
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Breanna Stewart re-signed with the New York Liberty on Saturday, the team announced. The move wasn't a surprise after she helped lead the franchise to its first WNBA championship last year. Stewart has won three league titles, the first two coming with Seattle.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Richmond’s Alysa Liu delivers the US its first women’s figure skating world championship in nearly 2 decades
item.description: Richmond's Liu, 19, dethroned three-time defending champion Kaori Sakamoto after coming out of a two year hiatus.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, The Mercury News

item.title: No longer sick, Dodgers' Mookie Betts hits a pair of '160-pound homers' as he works to gain weight
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Mookie Betts is no longer ailing, finally able to keep food down and eating up a storm to pack on the weight he dropped while battling a stomach virus during the first two weeks of the season. And, as the eight-time All-Star reminded everyone, “I'm still good at baseball.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Utah HC loses to defending champs in OT, 2-1
item.description: SUNRISE, Fla. (AP) - Sam Bennett scored his second goal of the game off an assist from Brad Marchand at 4:18 of overtime to give the Florida Panthers a 2-1 win over the Utah Hockey Club at Amerant Bank Arena on Friday. By earning one point, Utah is now nine points behind St.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Former North Carolina star Tyler Hansbrough takes swipe at Duke after Blue Devils advance to Elite Eight
item.description: UNC lost in the first round of this year's NCAA tournament, and former UNC star Tyler Hansbrough still holds the Tobacco Road rivalry dear and hopes Duke loses in the Elite Eight.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: RSL seeks redemption in Minnesota after home setback
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4) — Real Salt Lake looks to bounce back from a rare home loss as they go on the road to face Minnesota United FC on Saturday night. Real Salt Lake’s attack will be bolstered by the return of Polish attacking winger Dominic Marzcuk and U.S.
item.dc:creator: Mattey Casey, ABC 4

item.title: Jazz lose for 14th time in last 15 games, 121-110
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (AP) - Alperen Sengun had 33 points and 10 rebounds, Amen Thompson finished with 16 points, 10 rebounds and five assists, and the Houston Rockets beat the Utah Jazz 121-110 on Thursday night. The Jazz have now lost 14 of its last 15 games.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Sox fans shower Derrick Rose with MVP chants during first pitch
item.description: CHICAGO - Coming back to Chicago never gets old for Derrick Rose. The former Bulls MVP returned to the South Side Thursday to throw out the first pitch at the White Sox home opener, where he was showered with MVP chants from the crowd. "It's surreal. It's always surreal.
item.dc:creator: Rick Tarsitano, WGN 9

item.title: State audit reveals Anaheim doesn’t know condition of Angel Stadium on Opening Day
item.description: A report from the California State Auditor found that the city of Anaheim has not been able to ensure that Angel Stadium, one of the oldest stadiums in the majors, is being properly maintained.
item.dc:creator: Iman Palm, Fox 5

item.title: White Sox Opening Day: A lot of 'new' on the South Side in 2025. What to know if you're headed to Rate Field
item.description: CHICAGO — After a 2024 season that everyone would rather forget, there's a lot of "new" on the South Side as the White Sox get set to embark on their 2025 campaign Thursday. There's a new manager, Will Venable. There's a new stadium name, Rate Field. There's a new food and beverage menu.
item.dc:creator: Michael Johnson, WGN 9

item.title: BYU headed to Sweet 16 after 91-89 win over Wisconsin
item.description: DENVER (ABC4 Sports) - For the first time in 14 years, the BYU basketball team is headed to the Sweet 16. Richie Saunders scored 25 points, while Trevin Knell added 14, as the Cougars held off a ferocious late run by Wisconsin to hold on for a 91-89 victory at Ball Arena in Denver.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Real Salt Lake shut out by FC Dallas, 1-0
item.description: SANDY, Utah (AP) - Luciano Acosta scored the match's lone goal deep into first-half stoppage time to lift FC Dallas to a 1-0 win over Real Salt Lake on Saturday in a Western Conference match in Sandy, Utah.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4
